'''Thek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin]]. He was a member of a [[Believers]] cell on [[Tolea Biqua]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], which was commanded by [[Alina Impeveri]]. He liked to use vibro weapons.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|EndTimes: The Heart}} {{1st}}
